title: Infosys Extends Strategic Collaboration with Metro Bank to Modernize Finance Operations Using Workday
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a strategic collaboration with Metro Bank and Workday to modernize Metro Bank's finance operations. Infosys and Workday will help Metro Bank move from legacy systems to a unified, cloud-native platform using Workday Financial Management, Workday Accounting Center, Workday Spend Management, and Workday Prism Analytics. The document states the program is intended to streamline business processes, centralize financial data, automate key functions, improve decision-making, support future growth, accelerate financial closing and reporting, and strengthen governance and risk management through enhanced controls and audit trails. No contract value, duration, or revenue impact was disclosed.

partnerships_or_deals.section_heading: PRESS RELEASE Infosys Extends Strategic Collaboration with Metro Bank to Transform

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting, today announced a strategic collaboration with Metro Bank an independent UK bank, and Workday (NASDAQ: WDAY), the AI platform for managing people, money, and agents, to modernize Metro Bank's finance operations.
important_text_spans.section_heading: PRESS RELEASE Infosys Extends Strategic Collaboration with Metro Bank to Transform
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the main event, counterparties, and business objective.

important_text_spans.text: Infosys and Workday will support Metro Bank to transition from legacy systems to a unified, cloud-native platform by implementing a suite of Workday solutions.
important_text_spans.section_heading: PRESS RELEASE Infosys Extends Strategic Collaboration with Metro Bank to Transform
important_text_spans.reason: Identifies the transformation scope and cloud modernization component.

important_text_spans.text: By  implementing  a  suite  of  Workday  solutions,  including  Workday  Financial  Management,  Workday Accounting Center, Workday Spend Management, and Workday Prism Analytics Infosys will support Metro Bank  to  streamline  business  processes,  centralize  financial  data,  and  automate  key  functions.
